set.body: demopkg/amatrix.demo added (Rbuildignored, in-repo only): logit_fit() with crossprod_weighted/xty_weighted/solve hot kernels, tests vs glm.fit (1e-6) + CPU adgeMatrix identity + MLX float32 agreement, logit_demo_benchmark() showing 3.0x on MLX at n=20000 p=400. Linked from README.md and planning_docs/package-author-migration.md. Follow-ups: keep in sync if helper APIs change; consider promoting content into a vignette for CRAN docs track (6b3).
set.title: Demo package amatrix.demo: IRLS logistic regression showing package-author adoption
